name: Add Rigid Body To Cell
description: Add a RigidBody to a RobotCell under a given id. Passthrough builder: returns a new cell, leaves the input untouched.

inputParameters.name: robot_cell
inputParameters.description: The RobotCell to add the body to.

inputParameters.name: rigid_body_id
inputParameters.description: Id used to identify the body inside the cell.

outputParameters.name: robot_cell
outputParameters.description: New RobotCell with the body added.
